description: Horizontal cross-section of the human eye in side profile: convex cornea dome with entering light rays, iris diaphragm + pupil aperture, biconvex crystalline lens with ciliary muscle / zonular attachments, vitreous globe, warm retina lining the rear wall with central fovea pit, optic nerve exiting back-right. Mono callout labels on thin leader lines. Reveals sync to 'light enters the cornea, the lens focuses it onto the retina, your sensor.'
